title: WAIMA
subtitle: Farmer-Supplier-Agent Interaction Platform
description: A mobile application connecting farmers, suppliers, and agents to facilitate communication, orders, and coordination across the agricultural supply chain.
contributions: Implemented multi-role authentication and role-based access control for farmers, suppliers, and agents
Developed real-time chat and notification system to enable seamless communication
Built order management and request tracking features connecting multiple stakeholders
Ensured offline functionality and conflict resolution during network interruptions
Optimized UI/UX for multi-user interactions, improving engagement and usability

title: FAO Digital Services Platform
subtitle: Farmer Support App
description: A mobile application providing farmers with information, guidance, and services to improve agricultural production and decision-making.
contributions: Developed information modules delivering best practices, weather alerts, and service updates to farmers
Integrated data sync mechanisms to ensure up-to-date content even in low-connectivity areas
Implemented user-friendly search and navigation for easy access to agricultural resources
Built features to facilitate interaction with agricultural services and agents
Ensured app scalability and maintainability with Bloc state management and modular design

title: FAO Mobile App Administration Platform (Web)
subtitle: App
description: A web-based administration platform designed to manage and monitor FAO mobile applications, giving regional admins and super admins full control over data and workflows.
contributions: Developed dashboards and management tools for regional and super admin roles
Built features to monitor mobile app data, user activity, and workflow status in real-time
Implemented CRUD operations and role-based access control to secure sensitive information
Optimized UI for desktop web, focusing on usability and efficiency for admins
Ensured seamless integration with mobile apps via APIs, supporting consistent data flow

title: Push Notification Service
subtitle: Backend System
description: A backend messaging service designed to manage and deliver push notifications to mobile application users in a scalable and reliable manner.
contributions: Developed dashboards and management tools for regional and super admin roles
Built features to monitor mobile app data, user activity, and workflow status in real-time
Implemented CRUD operations and role-based access control to secure sensitive information
Optimized UI for desktop web, focusing on usability and efficiency for admins
Ensured seamless integration with mobile apps via APIs, supporting consistent data flow

title: HellOOpass Personal
subtitle: Personal Wallet Application
description: A mobile wallet application allowing users to manage funds from the company or self-top-ups and make payments to registered businesses.
contributions: Implemented wallet creation, top-up, and payment functionalities with secure transaction flows
Integrated payment APIs to process transactions reliably and securely
Built detailed transaction history and user balance management features
Ensured smooth state management using Bloc for asynchronous operations and error handling
Optimized user experience for fast, intuitive financial operations

title: HellOOpass Merchant
subtitle: Merchant Wallet Application (Closed-Loop Payment System)
description: A merchant-focused wallet application enabling businesses to receive payments from users within a closed-loop ecosystem and withdraw funds to linked bank accounts.
contributions: Developed merchant wallet system to securely receive and manage customer payments
Implemented closed-loop transaction logic ensuring controlled fund circulation within the ecosystem
Built withdrawal flow integrating bank transfer APIs with proper validation and status tracking
Designed real-time balance updates and detailed transaction history
Implemented secure authentication and role-based access control for merchant accounts
Handled edge cases such as failed transactions, reconciliation, and duplicate payment prevention

title: HellOOMarket
subtitle: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce mobile application enabling users to browse products, purchase online using an internal wallet, and process payments through external bank integrations.
contributions: Developed end-to-end shopping flow including product browsing, cart management, checkout, and order tracking
Integrated internal wallet system for seamless in-platform payments
Connected external bank payment APIs for secure transaction processing
Implemented transaction validation and error handling to prevent duplicate or failed payments
Built order history and payment tracking system for transparency
Optimized state management using Bloc for handling complex asynchronous payment and checkout flows

title: CIYA
subtitle: Ride-Sharing Platform (Driver & User Apps)
description: A mobile ride-sharing application enabling users to book rides and drivers to manage ride requests, with real-time trip tracking and integrated payments.
contributions: Developed dual-role applications for users and drivers with synchronized real-time trip updates
Implemented ride request, acceptance, and tracking flows with live location updates
Integrated payment gateways for seamless fare processing and transaction validation
Built multi-stage trip status UI to reflect ride progress accurately for both users and drivers
Ensured smooth state management using GetX, handling concurrent updates and network failures
Optimized performance and UX for real-time notifications, map rendering, and driver-user interactions

title: LIB Mobile Banking App
subtitle: Mobile Banking Application (iOS)
description: A secure mobile banking application on the iOS platform enabling users to manage accounts, perform transactions, and access core banking services.
contributions: Supported and enhanced iOS-specific features, ensuring smooth native performance and platform compliance
Managed iOS builds, certificates, provisioning profiles, and deployment to the App Store
Implemented secure authentication flows and transaction validation mechanisms
Ensured compliance with Apple App Store guidelines during submission and review process
Optimized performance and resolved iOS-specific issues related to permissions, background tasks, and push notifications
Assisted in production releases, version updates, and hotfix deployments

title: One Loans
subtitle: Loan Management & Approval Platform (Mobile + Web)
description: A full-stack loan service platform enabling users to request loans, track balances and statuses, while providing administrators with tools to review, approve, or reject loan applications.
contributions: Developed mobile application allowing users to View loan balance and repayment status, Submit loan requests, Track approval progress.
Built web-based admin dashboard using React for reviewing and managing loan applications
Implemented backend services using Node.js and Express for handling loan workflows
Designed MongoDB schemas for loan records, user roles, and approval states
Implemented validation, approval logic, and status transitions to prevent inconsistent loan states
Ensured secure API communication and error handling across mobile and web clients
